creator: sunpoet@sunpoet.net
text:
Since other ports (ex: archivers/p5-IO-Compress-Bzip2) install files in
%%SITE_PERL%%/IO/Compress/Adapter and %%SITE_PERL%%/IO/Uncompress/Adapter also.
Use dirrmtry instead of dirrm to eliminate error messages during deinstallation.

Port maintainer (jadawin@FreeBSD.org) is cc'd.

Generated with FreeBSD Port Tools 0.99
